rows.question: What is integration 'Directus Auth' used for?
rows.build_instruction: Configure integration directus_auth: server-side Directus SDK; secure cookies/session
rows.test_instruction: Login, logout, school isolation tests.

rows.question: Is integration 'Directus Auth' mandatory?
rows.build_instruction: Mark integration directus_auth priority as mandatory; allow mock if not MVP mandatory.
rows.test_instruction: Integration config status appears in environment checklist.

rows.question: What data direction applies to integration 'Directus Auth'?
rows.build_instruction: Implement integration directus_auth as read_write.
rows.test_instruction: Integration tests verify read/write direction only.

rows.question: What security controls apply to integration 'Directus Auth'?
rows.answer: No admin token in browser; school user scoped by role and school_id.
rows.build_instruction: Apply security controls for directus_auth: No admin token in browser; school user scoped by role and school_id.
rows.test_instruction: Security test validates controls.

integrations.security_controls: No admin token in browser; school user scoped by role and school_id.
